title: Senior Teacher - Aptech Advisory Limited - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Aptech Advisory Limited - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Teacher looking for your next big career move? Aptech Advisory Limited in Nashik offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Aptech Advisory Limited:
Aptech Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aptech Advisory Limited!
